message:
fix(connectors): separate operation names from capability IDs in test token helpers

Refactor generate_valid_token across 9 connectors (discord, figma, github,
gmail, google-calendar, pinecone, plaid, qdrant, s3) to accept an operation
name and derive the coarser-grained capability ID via a match table. This
aligns tests with the production capability model where a single capability
(e.g. "s3.read") authorizes multiple operations (e.g. "s3.get_object",
"s3.list_objects"). Previously the same string was used for both, which
masked authorization-boundary bugs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
